data.name: _layout.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="_formatLabel" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_formatCombo" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="_widthLabel" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_widthUpDown" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="_heightLabel" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_heightUpDown" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="_dpiLabel" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_dpiUpDown" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="_qualityLabel" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_qualityUpDown" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="_titleLabel" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_titleTextBox" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="_grayscaleCheckBox" Row="6" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="_saveLabel" Row="7" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_pathTextBox" Row="7" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_browseButton" Row="7" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_buttonPanel" Row="8" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="3" /></Controls><Columns Styles="AutoSize,0,Percent,100,AutoSize,0" /><Rows Styles="AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0" /></TableLayoutSettings>
